headline: Target Baby Wipes Recall And What It Could Mean For TGT Stock
summary: Target has issued a voluntary nationwide recall of select Up & Up baby wipes after FDA testing found contamination with Burkholderia cepacia complex and Burkholderia gladioli bacteria. The recall affects multiple lots of a popular store brand product used primarily by infants and young children. Target is advising customers to stop using the affected wipes and return them to stores for a refund. For investors watching NYSE:TGT, this recall lands at a time when the stock is trading around...

headline: Walmart, Target make play for Sephora, Ulta shoppers
summary: During the Covid pandemic, when nobody was leaving the house and life was happening over Zoom, a lot of people reduced their spending by virtue of having no place to go. But one category remained strong even as consumers were cutting back elsewhere — beauty. The beauty category has ...
